comments.author: reviewer1
comments.body: This looks good, but consider adding error handling here.

-    return check_password(user)

pr_with_multiple_commits.title: Refactor user management
pr_with_multiple_commits.author: senior_dev
pr_with_multiple_commits.description: Major refactoring of the user management system to improve performance and maintainability.

comments.author: tech_lead
comments.body: This is a significant change. Let's make sure we have comprehensive tests.
comments.diff_hunk:
@@ -43,8 +43,12 @@
 class UserService:
-    def get_user(self, user_id):
-        return User.query.get(user_id)
+    def get_user(self, user_id):
+        # Add caching for better performance
+        cached_user = self.cache.get(f'user_{user_id}')
+        if cached_user:
+            return cached_user
+        return User.query.get(user_id)

comments.author: qa_engineer
comments.body: I've added the test cases you requested. They cover all the new functionality.

     # Test implementation
